Beanie.description: The best player on the JDL as of June 2026. By far has the most completions on the list and also single-handedly ruined my life for multiple weeks because I had to add over 100 levels to the JDL.

Bluutemp.description: Before Beanie joined Jerbless, Bluu was the best player on the list.

Ant_Gam3R.description: The jerbless member with the most subscribers by FAR, currently the only member with over 100k subs.

LuckyNS.description: The jerbless member with the most aura. He is, the Anaheim Annihilator, and when he touches down, things get serious.

Vernosis.description: Our interviewer and BIGGEST member, who has interviewed numerous famous people in the community.

Xtinct.description: The one who started Jerbless, and pretty much brought everyone together. We wouldn't be here without him, the blind piggy cyclops.

Zovori.description: Owner of this list! I make almost every change to the JDL with some help from Hivehead, Mathgenius and AI (I'll learn how to code eventually I'm sorry)
